title: Law of Cosines
text: How could we use the law of cosines to find the length of the third side? Remember that the law of cosines is $$c^2=a^2+b^2+2\operatorname{abcos}\left(X\right)$$, X is the given angle between a and $$b$$ and $$cos(X)=\frac{a^2+b^2-c^2}{2ab}$$

title: Finding the Angle
text: Use the formula for finding the angle of a triangle using the given side lengths. Keep in mind we define angles with respect to opposite sides.

title: Value of Cos A
text: After simplifying the expression using the law of cosines what is the value of Cos C (three decimal places)?
